title: Primer TE (10mM Tris, 0.1mM EDTA, pH8.0)
author: Jacquelina.Woods

steps_raw.instruction: 100 µL Tris (1 M) pH 8.0 RNase-free Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM9856 ,, or equivalent.
20 µL EDTA (0.5 M) pH 8.0 RNase-free Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM9261 ,, or equivalent.
9.88 mL Nuclease-Free Water Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM9937 , or equivalent.
